cases.name: Primary Chainlink conversion remains explicit and conservative
cases.notes: Cross-currency receipts now carry explicit oracle evidence and the configured conversion margin.

cases.name: Fallback activation stays visible instead of silent
cases.notes: Pyth fallback is bounded, operator-visible, and still tied to the same rate contract.

cases.name: Degraded stale-cache grace is bounded and explicit
cases.notes: The stale-cache path widens margin and source labeling instead of pretending to be a normal healthy read.

cases.name: Unsupported pairs fail closed
cases.notes: No unpinned pair is converted implicitly.

cases.name: Manipulated or divergent oracle inputs trip the circuit breaker
cases.notes: Divergent Chainlink and Pyth reads deny cross-currency enforcement deterministically.

cases.name: Operator pause and trusted-chain controls stop unsafe enforcement
cases.notes: Pair disable, chain disable, and global pause surface explicit errors and runtime-report status.
